definitions.text: Direction. Guidance; help. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller} A polite approach made to another person, especially of a romantic nature; an amorous advance. A manner of speaking or writing to another; language, style.
examples: a man of pleasing or insinuating address
The President's address is 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue NW in Washington, D.C.
